title: Boxing Gloves
description: Replaces swords with 3D boxing gloves and adds punching sound effects
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## Showcase ## Information texture pack that replaces swords with boxing gloves and replaces the hit/sword sounds with punching sounds. no naming items required! works on single player and most multiplayer servers. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this pack in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this pack or assets from this pack in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this pack or assets from this pack. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
